intent: produce a local data file containing valid JSON with the key "ok"
notes: Forces the network-family methods (primary, then mirror) to tombstone. With the network siblings exhausted, the loop makes an ORDINARY backtrack: relax the soft constraint 'prefer a fresh network source' and take the local path, which progresses to success. This is NOT the K=5 upstream-jump heuristic (that fires only when K consecutive siblings tombstone while MORE untried siblings remain) — it is simply running out of network siblings and backing up. Fully side-effect-free: every node's outcome comes from a rule or the tombstone default; no rule executes a real action. Run with a task that declares the soft constraint 'prefer fresh network source over local cache'.

rules.reason: file parses as JSON and contains key "ok"
